chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF THE FUQAHA (JURISTS) AND THE ULAMA (SCHOLARS)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 485)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 485)
text: إِنَّ مَرْيَمَ (عليها السلام) حَمَلَتْ بِعِيسَى (عليه السلام) تِسْعَ سَاعَاتٍ كُلُّ سَاعَةٍ شَهْراً.

en.hubeali: H 14964 – Aban, from a man, who said:
Abu Abdullahasws has said that: ‘Maryamas carried (in heras) Isaas for nine hours, each hour for a month’.
en.sarwar: 517. Aban, from Umar Bin Yazeed who said: I said to Abu Abdullah (a.s.) that: ‘Al-Mugheira (and his people) are alleging that this day is for the night that approaches it’. So he (a.s.) said: ‘They lie! This day today is for the night that has passed. The people of Al-Nakhla, when they see the crescent say, ‘The Sacred Month has entered’.
